caption: A man with a beard, wearing a grey shirt and a dark vest, speaks into an ANI microphone in an outdoor setting with trees and greenery in the background. He is positioned centrally in each frame, appearing to give a press statement. The scene is overlaid with news graphics from News18 India. In the first frame, a red banner reads "बिहार कैबिनेट की कल पहली बैठक होगी" with a header stating "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". The second frame's header changes to "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" while the banner remains. The third frame features a banner stating "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है" and a "BREAKING" graphic. The final frame returns to the header "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'" and displays a "BREAKING NEWS" graphic. Throughout the sequence, small profile photos of various political figures, including "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार" and "विजय चौधरी," appear in side panels.
